role of company: YIARI is a non-profit foundation with expertise in wildlife protection, biodiversity conservation and implementing sustainable community-led conservation strategies in the same region as the Mayas Project. In 2009 YIARI established the first rescue centre for orangutans in Ketapang, West Borneo. For more than ten years, YIARI has been working alongside communities and other local actors to raise awareness of the importance of natural ecosystems and for the preservation of natural ecosystems, particularly forest and swamp forest ecosystems home to orangutan and other endangered and critically endangered wildlife. YIARI will provide services to the Mayas Project including; community development and consultation, and communities facilitation for forest protection, and biodiversity conservation consultancy
